title: Halloween Pumpkin Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA | 7-8cm Medium Size Baking Tool | Spooky Fall Cookie Stamp
description:
Bring the magic of Halloween to your kitchen with our delightful Halloween Pumpkin Cookie Cutter! This charming pumpkin-shaped cutter captures the iconic spirit of the spooky season, letting you create perfectly shaped pumpkin cookies that will impress your family, friends, and trick-or-treaters alike. Whether you are hosting a Halloween party, preparing a festive bake sale, or simply enjoying a cozy autumn baking session, this cookie cutter is the perfect addition to your seasonal baking collection.

**Features & Design**
Our Halloween Pumpkin Cookie Cutter features a detailed pumpkin silhouette complete with stem, making every cookie instantly recognizable and festive. The cutter is designed with clean, sharp edges to ensure precise cuts through your favorite cookie dough, fondant, or even craft clay. The comfortable grip height makes it easy to press evenly, producing consistent results every single time. Each cutter is carefully 3D printed layer by layer, resulting in a sturdy and durable tool that holds its shape through dozens of baking sessions. The design has been tested and refined to ensure clean releases and minimal dough sticking.

**Dimensions**
This listing is for our Medium (M) size, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. This versatile size is ideal for standard cookies that are large enough to decorate with royal icing, fondant details, or a simple dusting of powdered sugar. The cutting depth is optimized for typical sugar cookie and butter cookie dough thicknesses.

**How to Use**
For best results, roll your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 5-7mm. Lightly dust the cutter with flour or dip it in powdered sugar before each cut to prevent sticking. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then gently lift and push out the shape. For intricate designs, chill your dough for 15-20 minutes before cutting to ensure crisp, clean edges. This cutter also works beautifully with fondant, modeling chocolate, and soft craft clays for non-food creative projects.

**Care Instructions**
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. After washing, dry the cutter thoroughly before storing. PLA is a plant-based, biodegradable thermoplastic, which means it is eco-friendly but sensitive to high heat. Always store your cutter in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources to maintain its shape and longevity.

**Perfect Gift Ideas**
This Halloween Pumpkin Cookie Cutter makes a wonderful gift for anyone who loves baking and the fall season. It is a fantastic stocking stuffer or Halloween party favor that stands out from ordinary gifts. Pair it with a homemade cookie dough mix, a bag of sprinkles, and a recipe card for an unforgettable DIY baking gift set. Teachers, coworkers, baking enthusiasts, and new homeowners will all appreciate this thoughtful and unique seasonal present. It is also a great addition to kids' baking kits, encouraging little ones to get creative in the kitchen during the spookiest time of year.

**About Our Shop**
Every cookie cutter in our shop is handmade and 3D printed to order in small batches, ensuring quality and attention to detail with each piece. We take pride in crafting unique baking tools that bring joy and creativity to your kitchen. Because each item is printed individually, slight variations may occur, making every cutter truly one of a kind. Thank you for supporting our small creative business — we love being part of your baking adventures!
